$comment: Generated by 'python tools/yolo.py catalog'. Do not edit by hand.

software.name: Zotero
software.notable_strength: Local-first with a strong open ecosystem and durable open formats.
software.primary_use: Reference and source management for research workflows.
software.verify_before_use: How synced storage handles sensitive sources, and current sync terms.

software.name: Ollama
software.notable_strength: Keeps prompts and data on your own machine.
software.verify_before_use: Hardware requirements against the specific models you need, and each model's license.

software.name: Hugging Face
software.notable_strength: Breadth of open models and artifacts under one roof.
software.primary_use: Model hub, datasets, and hosted inference.
software.verify_before_use: The license terms of each individual model or dataset — they vary widely.

software.name: n8n
software.notable_strength: Source-available with a self-hosting option for data control.
software.primary_use: Workflow automation connecting tools and services.
software.verify_before_use: License fit for your use case and where connector data flows.

software.name: Langfuse
software.notable_strength: Open-source core with self-hosting for sensitive traces.
software.primary_use: Tracing and evaluation for LLM applications.
software.verify_before_use: What prompt/response data is stored, where, and for how long.

software.name: Obsidian
software.notable_strength: Durable plain-text storage you fully control.
software.primary_use: Local-first personal knowledge base in Markdown.
software.verify_before_use: Trustworthiness of any community plugin — plugins run with local access.

software.name: SQLite
software.notable_strength: Zero-dependency durability with a long stability record.
software.primary_use: Embedded database for local, auditable data work.

software.name: Git
software.notable_strength: Complete history and diff evidence, host-independent.
software.primary_use: Version control; the provenance backbone for artifact history.
software.verify_before_use: Your team's history-rewriting norms, so provenance survives.

software.name: Visual Studio Code
software.notable_strength: Large extension ecosystem across languages and workflows.
software.primary_use: Extensible code editor common in AI-assisted development.
software.verify_before_use: Telemetry settings and the data handling of each extension you add.

software.name: Pandoc
software.notable_strength: Deterministic, scriptable output suitable for reproducible pipelines.
software.primary_use: Universal document conversion between markup and document formats.
software.verify_before_use: Conversion fidelity for complex layouts before relying on it.

software.name: GitHub
software.notable_strength: Pull-request review maps directly to human checkpoints.
software.primary_use: Repository hosting, review, and community workflows.
software.verify_before_use: Data policies and access controls for private or sensitive material.

software.name: Discourse
software.primary_use: Community forum platform for durable public knowledge.
software.verify_before_use: The moderation workload a healthy instance requires.

workflows.title: Client Intake → Risk Check → Draft Plan → Approval
Incident → Triage → Options → Decision → Learning Review
